column2: The LRE percentage represents the portion of the school week the student spends in the general education setting. Federal law (IDEA) requires students be educated in the least restrictive environment appropriate.
Enter the weekly pull-out or separate-setting minutes for each service provider in Section 2. Only count minutes the student is OUTSIDE the general education classroom.
Do NOT count push-in services. If a service is delivered inside the general education classroom (e.g., an SLP working with the student in class), those minutes should NOT be entered.
This tool auto-calculates all results — no manual math is needed. Simply enter your minutes and adjust the school schedule in Section 3 if needed.
